title: Decision: Local Button Component Override
content_summary: Decision to implement local Button override in February 2026. Nova's Button did not support icon-only variant needed for dashboard toolbar. Now outdated — Nova shipped icon support in March. Local override should be removed.
author: Jamal Foster

decision_log.title: Implement local Button override for icon-only variant
decision_log.decision: Build local Button until Nova ships icon-only support. Remove override once Nova ships the variant.
decision_log.rationale: Dashboard toolbar required icon-only buttons. Nova Button did not support this. Blocked on Nova roadmap.
alternatives_considered: Wait for Nova to ship the variant (estimated 2 months)
